title: 2024 - Runaway Bulls?
summary:
Main
The three things we would notice in the beginning of the year. 2024 began with great momentum for risk assets, as traders bet on sharp rate cuts with no recession. To position themselves, investors need to answer two key questions: a) how will inflation come down and will it stay there and b) is the Fed still mindful of repressing market volatility?
